evidence: "A nice little film, punctuated with gentle humor, about the tiny things that make up the relationships..."
"If you like dissolute Irishmen and quirky humor, Black Books is great."
"This is a sweet little series about their relationship, and their quest for geographic solutions to the problems in it."
"A sweet simple movie... This is a gentle bittersweet movie about being adults and being family and loving dogs."
"The first episode was a little slow to develop and definitely the weakest but it got better and better."
"Starts off misleadingly sanctimonious but gets more complex."
"This is a terrific short with compelling characters and nice crisp production values."
"Visually stunning but completely unintelligible; it appears the filmmakers got caught up in the technical challenges..."
"If you like Coen Bros you'll probably like this."
"I wish this series had lasted longer."
"This will not leave you feeling happy. But it will stick with you."
"Beautiful, quirky, dark but uplifting. I loved it."
"Hard to watch and take in; eye opening."
"This is a perfectly self-contained short that also left me feeling wistful for a full length film about these flawlessly flawed characters."

summary: The user enjoys drama and comedy with a preference for simple narratives and slower pacing. They value high production quality and emotional resonance in their viewing experiences.
